name: Insta360 X4 Quick Reader
description: The Insta360 Quick Reader for your X4 action camera allows you to record footage onto the module and transfer it to your phone or computer without using up additional camera battery.

features.Key Features: Quick Reader for Insta360 X4 | Compatible with Apple or Android Devices | Transfer and Edit Files | USB-C and Lightning Connectors | microSD Compatible
features.What's In The Box: Insta360 Quick Reader for X4 | Thumbscrew
